# Refactor Phase 2: Features and Components

Advance tasks in workstreams `WS-002` and `WS-003`.

## Goal

Normalize feature entrypoints and clean reusable UI boundaries between `features/**`, `components/**`, `components/shared/**`, and `components/ui/**`.

## Requirements

- Keep feature modules as orchestration only.
- Move reusable presentational blocks into domain or shared components when justified.
- Keep primitives in `components/ui/**`.
- Update the JSON backlog and progress artifacts before ending the pass.
